headings.text: Custom Assembly With Speed and Scale
Advantages and Benefits of Xometry's Assembly Service

meta_description: Custom assembly services for manufacturing. ISO 9001:2015 and AS9100D certified. A new service from Xometry, the leader in custom manufacturing on demand

sections.heading: Custom Assembly Services
sections.text: Custom Assembly Services Metal and plastic part, electromechanical, and cable & harness assembly along with physical and functional testing are available. Fast lead times ISO 9001:2015, ISO 13485 and AS9100D certified Get Your Assembly Quote Â Â All uploads are secure and confidential.

sections.heading: Custom Assembly With Speed and Scale
sections.text: Custom Assembly With Speed and Scale Endless Assembly Options Choose from millions of possible combinations of materials, finishes, tolerances, markings, and certifications for your assembly order. Easy to Use Get assembled, ready-to-use parts delivered right to your door without the hassle of sourcing, project management, logistics, or shipping. Quality Assurance Xometry's assembly service is a great choice for high quality, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 13485, and AS9100D certified parts.

sections.heading: Advantages and Benefits of Xometry's Assembly Service
sections.text: Advantages and Benefits of Xometry's Assembly Service Based on your program scope including technology, volume, and packaging requirements, we will precision match capacity and technology requirements within our network of certified assembly partners. Leverage in our in-house ISO 9001 manufacturing center and our partner network for nearly unlimited capacity. Our skilled engineering team will help you with every step of the process. Xometry also offers industry-leading CNC machining, sheet metal fabrication, 3D printing, and injection molding services.
